mapper.select: /* BadwordFilterMapper.selectActiveBadwordList */ SELECT ID, KEYWORD, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED, CATEGORY, MATCH_TYPE, SEVERITY, SOURCE, IS_ACTIVE FROM BADWORD WHERE IS_ACTIVE = '1' ORDER BY ID
mapper.insert: /* BadwordFilterMapper.insertAdminReviewQueue */ INSERT INTO ADMIN_REVIEW_QUEUE ( ID, BLOCK_LOG_ID, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( ADMIN_REVIEW_QUEUE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{blockLogId}, 'pending', #{regDt} )
